allow: PowerShell($root = "c:\\Dev\\Biometric"; Write-Output "=== Top-level of $root ==="; Get-ChildItem -Force $root | Select-Object Mode, Length, Name | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String)

PowerShell($candidates = @\("c:\\Dev\\Biometric\\data", "c:\\Dev\\Biometric\\data\\socofing", "c:\\Dev\\Biometric\\SOCOFing", "c:\\Dev\\Biometric\\data\\SOCOFing"\); foreach \($c in $candidates\) { if \(Test-Path $c\) { Write-Output "EXISTS: $c" } else { Write-Output "missing: $c" } })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== PWD ==="; Get-Location; Write-Output "=== Items \(incl hidden\) ==="; Get-ChildItem -Force "c:\\Dev\\Biometric" -ErrorAction Continue | Format-Table Mode, Name, Length -AutoSize; Write-Output "=== Count ==="; \(Get-ChildItem -Force "c:\\Dev\\Biometric"\).Count)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== local vs origin ==="; Write-Output "local  main : $\(git rev-parse main\)"; Write-Output "origin main : $\(git rev-parse origin/main\)"; Write-Output "=== tracking / ahead-behind ==="; git status -sb | Select-Object -First 1; Write-Output "=== origin/main log ==="; git log --oneline -2 origin/main)
